title: All Of The Kitchen
description: A Kitchen Sink modpack originally made for a Minecraft Server.
body:
## **Welcome to the All Of The Kitchen 1 Page! 🎉** Here, we proudly present the **All Of The Kitchen**, an exceptional all-in-one experience designed to cater to every Minecraft player's desires. Whether you're an adventurer, a builder, a tech enthusiast, or simply looking to dive into a realm of endless possibilities, our modpack has got you covered! With regular updates and a thriving community, this modpack promises to be your gateway to a whole new dimension of fun and excitement in the Minecraft modded universe. ## **A Universe of Possibilities 🌌** At Rosslight Network, we believe that every player should have the freedom to choose their Minecraft adventure. Our modpack is thoughtfully curated to ensure that you can create your own unique journey. From building magnificent structures, from mastering complex machinery to exploring magical realms, you'll find a wealth of options to satisfy your creativity and imagination. ## **Quite Lightweight! 🪶** Our modpack with using Fabric and Sodium can give you lots of performance, even on the lowest end. Ram requirements are: - 🖥️ MINIMUM 2GB - 🖥️ RECOMMENDED 4GB - 🥽 MINIMUM 3GB - 🥽 RECOMMENDED 4GB ### NOTE, LOWER RAM ALLOCATION MAY HELP PERFORMANCE. ## **VR Compatible! 🥽** Our modpack comes with compatibility so then you can play in VR, but still get all the same mods working the exact same as if you were using a flatscreen monitor. ## **An Unrivaled Kitchen Sink Collection 🛠️** Dubbed as a "kitchen sink" modpack, we've left no stone unturned in assembling a comprehensive selection of mods to cater to every aspect of your gameplay. Dive into an ocean of content, featuring a diverse range of mods covering technology, magic, exploration, aesthetics, quality-of-life enhancements, and so much more! Craft, build, explore, and conquer - the choice is yours!
[](https://modrinth.com/modpack/rltnm)



*We use macaw's suite of mods* and *[BLAST](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/blast).* *There is other unaccredited mods used in this modpack, please check it in versions.*
